creator: aryeh.friedman@gmail.com
text:
I should of updated the PR to show the temp solution that me and someone working together in -x11@ devised.. add the following line to your .xinitrc (or .xsession as the case may be):

setxkbmap -model pc105 -layout us

Only real draw back is there is a noticable delay after typing the first character in session and all additional ones
